panels.title: Latest Sweep
panels.description: When the last spectrum sweep completed

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(timestamp) AS last_sweep FROM spectrum.scans

panels.title: Freq Bins
panels.description: Number of frequency bins in the latest sweep

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS bins FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.scans ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1)

panels.title: Sweeps Today
panels.description: Number of completed sweeps since midnight

targets.rawSql: SELECT uniq(sweep_id) AS sweeps FROM spectrum.scans WHERE timestamp > today()

panels.title: Current Power Spectrum
panels.description: Power vs frequency from the latest sweep (88-470 MHz)

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(freq_hz / 1000000.0, 1) AS freq_mhz, power_dbfs FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.scans ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY freq_hz

panels.title: Signal Power Over Time
panels.description: Power at known frequencies over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.timestamp AS time, s.power_dbfs AS value, kf.name AS metric FROM spectrum.scans s INNER JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies kf ON s.freq_hz >= kf.freq_hz - greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000) AND s.freq_hz <= kf.freq_hz + greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000) WHERE s.timestamp >= $__fromTime AND s.timestamp <= $__toTime AND kf.category IN ('airband', 'marine', 'tetra', 'ism') ORDER BY time

panels.title: Active Known Frequencies
panels.description: Which known signals are currently detected with their power levels

targets.rawSql: SELECT kf.name, kf.category, round(kf.freq_hz / 1000000.0, 3) AS freq_mhz, kf.modulation, round(fl.power_dbfs, 1) AS power_dbfs, fl.last_seen FROM spectrum.known_frequencies kf INNER JOIN spectrum.freq_latest fl FINAL ON fl.freq_hz >= kf.freq_hz - greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000) AND fl.freq_hz <= kf.freq_hz + greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000) WHERE fl.last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE ORDER BY fl.power_dbfs DESC

panels.title: Anomalies
panels.description: Frequency bins with power significantly above their hourly baseline

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.timestamp, round(s.freq_hz / 1000000.0, 2) AS freq_mhz, round(s.power_dbfs, 1) AS power, round(avgMerge(b.avg_power), 1) AS baseline, round(s.power_dbfs - avgMerge(b.avg_power), 1) AS deviation_db, kf.name AS known_signal FROM spectrum.scans s LEFT JOIN spectrum.hourly_baseline b ON s.freq_hz = b.freq_hz AND toStartOfHour(s.timestamp) = b.hour LEFT JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies kf ON s.freq_hz >= kf.freq_hz - greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000) AND s.freq_hz <= kf.freq_hz + greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000) WHERE s.timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE GROUP BY s.timestamp, s.freq_hz, s.power_dbfs, kf.name HAVING deviation_db > 10 ORDER BY deviation_db DESC LIMIT 30
